rationale: The citing paper references Tunuguntla and Hoban (2021) as background for how real-time display ad auctions and generalized second-price mechanisms work. The citation appears in explanatory passages (including a footnote) that contrast pay-per-click and pay-per-impression settings and point readers to auction details. The GDPR study does not build its hypotheses, identification strategy, or core analysis on the cited paper's bidding algorithm or theoretical results.
